items.title: Enhance Discovery with Smart-Money Mints in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates smart-money emerging mints into the discovery pipeline, ensuring they are scored alongside trending mints. Key changes include the addition of a new helper module for loading smart-money data and the implementation of a merge strategy to enhance mint discovery. The update also introduces 9 new unit tests, improving overall test coverage.

items.title: Centralized OAuth Management for Connectors in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces centralized management of OAuth grants at AuthFrontend, streamlining the user experience. Nexior now provides a read-only view of existing connections and redirects all connection actions to AuthFrontend, ensuring users can return seamlessly. Key files have been modified to support this new flow, enhancing the overall functionality and user interface.

items.title: Automated i18n Updates from zh-CN in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces automatic translation updates for internationalization (i18n) based on changes from the zh-CN source. Key modifications include enhancements across multiple language files, ensuring a more consistent and accurate user experience. The changes impact various languages, improving accessibility for a broader audience.

items.title: Enhance Recent Songs Panel with Advanced Filters in Nexior 🎶
items.summary: This update introduces a new Filter popover in the Suno Recent panel, allowing users to refine their song searches by type, duration, video presence, and model. The user experience is enhanced with active filter counts, a reset option, and improved accessibility for different languages. These changes aim to streamline song discovery and improve user interaction.

items.title: Enhance Connectors Menu with URL Feature Toggle and Icon Fixes in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a URL-based feature toggle for the Connectors menu, allowing users to enable it via query parameters without needing to rebuild the Docker image. Additionally, several missing Font Awesome icons have been registered, ensuring the Connectors page displays correctly. These changes enhance user experience and streamline feature testing.

items.title: Centralize OAuth Connector Management in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update centralizes OAuth grant management by routing all connector interactions through AuthBackend, eliminating redundancy in the aichat2 worker. Key changes include the removal of the local connectors store, updates to the connection API for fresh access tokens, and deprecation of old write actions. This enhances the sharing of OAuth grants across all platform consumers, ensuring a more streamlined user experience.

items.title: Enhance Voice Manager with Favorites Tab in Nexior 🌟
items.summary: This update introduces a new **Favorites** tab in the voice manager, allowing users to easily access their frequently-used voices. Key changes include the addition of a `favoritePersonaIds` field for persistence, a toggle button for favoriting voices, and updated internationalization support. The feature enhances user experience by enabling better voice management without requiring backend changes.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Scope Selection for Connectors in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new scope selection dialog for OAuth flows on the Connectors page, allowing users to choose which permissions to grant when connecting to providers like Google. By pre-selecting all bundles except 'login', users can easily authorize additional access, enhancing the overall functionality. The changes include updates to the user interface and localization files for improved user experience.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Flow with Required Parameter in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes an issue with the Google connector OAuth flow by adding the missing `response_type=code` parameter to the authorization URL. This change ensures compliance with the OAuth 2.0 specification, preventing errors during the authorization process. The modification was made in the `start_authorize()` function within the connections service.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Callback Handling in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the OAuth callback handling by distinguishing between the AuthBackend connection flow and the SSO login flow. It introduces a new generic callback page for providers without dedicated SSO pages and modifies existing GitHub and Google callback components to forward requests correctly. These changes ensure that OAuth connections are properly persisted and enhance the overall user experience.

items.title: Streamline OAuth Redirect for Connectors in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the OAuth redirect URI for connector flows to use the AuthFrontend's callback page, ensuring compatibility with GitHub's restrictions. The change allows the same OAuth app registration to serve both SSO login and connector flows, simplifying the setup for users. Additionally, documentation has been updated to reflect the new redirect URI requirements for various providers.

items.title: Enhance Price Lookup Tolerance for Thin Pools in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a structural issue in the price lookup mechanism for thin pools, which previously resulted in pending null rows. By implementing a two-stage lookup with a 2-hour tolerance, the system can now better handle gaps in candle data, improving the chances of resolving these nulls. The changes are expected to enhance data accuracy and support better strategy assessments moving forward.

items.title: Introducing Connectors Management Page in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new `/user/connections` page, allowing users to manage their third-party OAuth connectors such as GitHub, Google, and Slack. The feature is hidden by default and can be enabled via a feature flag. Key API endpoints for listing, authorizing, and managing connections have been added to the auth-backend, enhancing user experience and integration capabilities.

items.title: Enhance Audio Upload with Browse/Record Dialog in Nexior 🎤
items.summary: This update introduces a new audio Browse/Record dialog that aligns with Suno's UX. Users can now upload audio files via drag-and-drop or record directly in the browser, with features like a timer and preview. The implementation reuses existing API flows, ensuring no backend changes are necessary, while also adding internationalization support for English and Chinese.

items.title: Enhance Shadow Trader to Retry Transient Gaps in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes an issue where rows with transient price provider gaps were not retried, leading to potential data loss. The logic now ensures that only rows with valid return percentages or errors are considered terminal, allowing pending rows to be retried in future cron cycles. This change enhances data reliability and ensures that future provider hiccups won't permanently lose important data points.

items.title: Automated i18n Updates for Multiple Languages in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces auto-generated internationalization (i18n) translation updates from the zh-CN source. Key modifications include enhancements across various language files, ensuring improved localization for users. The changes affect multiple languages including Arabic, German, Spanish, and more, enhancing the overall user experience.

items.title: Exciting New P0 Features for Create Page in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces essential P0 features for the create page based on the Suno.com gap analysis. Key additions include character counters for lyrics and style, a toggle for manual or AI-generated lyrics, and a 'Clear All' button to reset the form. Internationalization support has also been added for English and Chinese.

items.title: Introducing Auth-Backend Connection Client in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new connection client for aichat2 that interfaces with the auth-backend's centralized connection vault. Key features include methods for token management and connection listing, enabling a smooth transition alongside existing MongoDB connectors. The migration strategy is outlined to ensure a seamless shift to PostgreSQL in future phases.

items.title: Enhance K8s Secrets for Connection System in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Kubernetes secrets and environment variables for the connection system, enhancing security with vault encryption and OAuth credentials. Key changes include the addition of a provisioning script for creating secrets and updates to deployment configurations to utilize these secrets effectively. The new healthcheck and refresh cronjobs ensure proactive management of active connections.

items.title: Enhance K8s Deployment and OAuth Setup Guide in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive guide for deploying the connection system to Kubernetes and registering OAuth applications with various providers. Key sections include generating secrets, updating K8s secrets, and troubleshooting common issues. This documentation is essential for ensuring a smooth deployment process and effective OAuth integration.

items.title: Enhance Smart Money Tracking with Amount-Aware Diff in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an amount-aware diff mechanism to address the blind spot in swing-trade signals for smart money wallets. By persisting raw on-chain amounts, the system can now detect significant position increases, ensuring that swing-buy events are accurately captured. This change is expected to improve the accuracy of smart money confirmations and enhance trading strategy measurements moving forward.

items.title: Exciting New Tools and Parameters Added in M C Ps 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces eight new audio tools and three new parameters to enhance the Suno OpenAPI integration. Key additions include voice creation, persona management, and advanced music generation options. The infrastructure has also been updated to support these new features, improving overall functionality and user experience.

items.title: Enhance Suno API Docs with New Features in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update syncs the Suno API documentation with the latest OpenAPI specifications, introducing new capabilities. Key changes include expanded action descriptions in the `suno_audios_generation_api_integration_guide.md` and the addition of a new guide for the `POST /suno/voices` endpoint, which allows users to create custom voice personas. These enhancements improve clarity and usability for developers integrating with the Suno API.

items.title: Enhance Connection Management with CronJobs in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces K8s CronJob infrastructure for proactive connection token refresh and daily health checks. Key additions include management commands for refreshing expiring connections and checking the health of active connections, along with corresponding CronJob manifests for scheduling these tasks. This enhancement aims to improve connection reliability and system health monitoring.

items.title: Enhance Lyrics Editing with Fullscreen Mode in Nexior 🎶
items.summary: This update introduces a new expand button in the lyrics toolbar, allowing users to open a fullscreen dialog for more comfortable editing of lyrics. The dialog features a 20-row textarea and includes all existing toolbar actions, improving the overall editing experience. Additionally, new icons have been registered for the expand and compress functions, and localization support has been added for both English and Chinese.

items.title: Enhance Suno Persona API with GET/DELETE Support in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces GET and DELETE methods for the Suno Persona API, allowing users to list and remove personas efficiently. The cost rule has been adjusted to charge 0.02 credits for POST requests while GET and DELETE are now free. Additionally, OpenAPI specifications have been updated to reflect these changes, ensuring seamless integration with the PlatformService and Nexior voice management UI.

items.title: Fix Helius Holder Concentration Issues in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses two critical bugs in the Helius DAS path that inflated the top-10 token holder concentration metrics. By implementing the correct methods to retrieve token supply and largest accounts, the calculations now accurately reflect the true distribution of token holders. The changes enhance the reliability of data provided to users and ensure consistency with external validation sources.

items.title: Enhance Internal Connections API and Authentication in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an internal token authentication mechanism for service-to-service communication, utilizing the `X-Internal-Token` header. New endpoints have been added under `/internal/v1/` for fetching, listing, and invalidating access tokens. This enhancement lays the groundwork for improved internal API interactions and sets the stage for future cronjob tasks.

items.title: Enhance Voice Management UI with Persona Selector in Nexior 🎤
items.summary: This update introduces a new voice management UI for Suno, enabling users to create, list, select, and delete voice personas directly from the Nexior frontend. Key features include a redesigned persona input with a searchable dropdown, a new VoiceManager panel for managing saved personas, and a VoiceCreateDialog for creating new voices from songs or audio uploads. Additionally, internationalization support has been added for English and Chinese.

items.title: Revamp persona API to RESTful standards in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update refactors the persona API to utilize GET and DELETE methods instead of POST for listing and deleting personas. The changes enhance adherence to RESTful principles, improving the API's usability and clarity. Additionally, a bug fix was implemented to correct the parameter order in the ttapi persister's getPersonas method.

items.title: Automated Research Cycle Results in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive report covering 19 candidates from various sources including the watchlist and trending platforms. Key findings include 5 holds and 14 skips based on liquidity and security assessments, with detailed rationale for each decision. The report also highlights degradation notes regarding trending mints and rugcheck issues.

items.title: Fix RPC Throttle and Auto-Create Issue Label in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses two critical issues in the audit workflow: the absence of the 'smart-money-audit' label and handling 429 errors from the public RPC. An idempotent step has been added to ensure the label exists before creating issues, while the retry logic for RPC calls has been enhanced to prevent unnecessary operator toil. The audit workflow can now be re-triggered seamlessly, improving overall efficiency.

items.title: Exciting New Public API Endpoints for Connections in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new connections service layer that enhances authorization state management, token persistence, and provider catalog functionalities. Key public API endpoints have been added, including those for listing providers, authorizing connections, and handling callbacks. Additionally, serializers for connection resources and provider catalog responses have been implemented, streamlining data handling.

items.title: Unified OAuth Provider Adapters Added in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a unified OAuth provider adapter contract along with token and profile data classes. Six new adapter modules for GitHub, Google, Notion, Linear, GitLab, and Slack have been implemented, enhancing the provider registry. The existing authentication flow remains intact, ensuring compatibility with current APIs.

items.title: Enhanced Retry Logic for Smart Money in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the retry mechanism for the Smart Money feature by increasing the throttle to 2.5 seconds and implementing a three-retry exponential backoff strategy. These changes aim to reduce the frequency of 429 errors encountered during RPC calls, enhancing the reliability of wallet snapshots. Tests have been updated to validate the new retry behavior and ensure non-429 errors are still handled promptly.

items.title: Enhance Persona Management with MongoDB Storage in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces MongoDB-based persona storage across all four Suno providers, enabling users to manage their personas effectively. Key changes include the addition of a new `personas` collection, CRUD methods for persona management, and a new endpoint for listing and deleting personas. This enhancement sets the stage for an improved voice management UI in Nexior.

items.title: Enhanced OAuth Support with Connection Model in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new Connection model and ConnectionStatus for managing OAuth grants at the platform level. It includes a migration for unique constraints and indexes to streamline refresh workflows, as well as vault utilities for secure token encryption and decryption. Additionally, new settings for various provider OAuth credentials have been added, laying the groundwork for future enhancements.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Connections Design Documentation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive platform-level OAuth Connections RFC in Chinese, detailing the connection vault model, token storage, and refresh strategies. Key decisions include reusing the existing GitHub OAuth app and opting for Kubernetes CronJob for token refresh. This documentation serves as a blueprint for future implementation across multiple services.

items.title: New Research Cycle Insights in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new research cycle with a detailed report added to the repository. Key findings include a review of 17 candidates, with 6 held and 11 skipped due to liquidity concerns. Notable mentions include MARSCOIN and BELKA, both flagged for suspicious activity despite their high scores.

items.title: Enhance RPC Handling with Throttling and Retry in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a critical issue where 6 out of 8 wallets were being rate-limited, leading to degraded smart-money signals. By implementing a throttle mechanism and a retry strategy for 429 errors, we ensure that wallet data is consistently captured without exceeding RPC limits. The changes include updated tests to validate the new behavior, enhancing the overall reliability of the system.

items.title: Enhance Holder Distribution with Helius DAS in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Helius DAS as the primary source for holder distribution, addressing previous issues with Solscan's public API. Key improvements include better aggregation of token accounts by owner and a fallback mechanism to ensure reliability. Operators need to add the new Helius API key as a repo secret to activate this feature.

items.title: Enhance Smart Money Roster with Freshness Audit in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new CLI command for auditing the freshness of the curated smart-money roster, addressing the risk of stale signals. It classifies wallets as Active, Idle, Unreachable, or NoSigs based on recent on-chain activity, and automates weekly checks to ensure the roster remains valid. The implementation includes a service layer for wallet audits and a workflow that tracks stale wallets for human review.

items.title: Enhance CI with Smart-Money Refresh in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates a new step in the CI pipeline to refresh the smart-money snapshot on an hourly basis. It ensures that the decision-gate logic can now function correctly by producing the necessary `smart_money_emerging.json` file. The changes also maintain the integrity of the shadow recorder, allowing it to operate even if the smart-money data is unavailable.

items.title: Exciting UX Enhancements for Suno in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update implements key P1 and P2 UX improvements for the Suno feature, including inspiration tags, enhanced search and sort functionalities, inline editing, and a progress bar. Users will also benefit from a new mashup multi-select option, making the interface more intuitive and user-friendly.

items.title: Unlocking Smart-Money Confirmation for Faster Decisions in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new flag for shadow recording that allows tagging of buyers at the moment of purchase, significantly enhancing the decision-making process. By implementing a relaxed decision gate, the system can now recognize a path with as few as 20 entries plus one smart-money confirmation, reducing the time to investment readiness from 5-7 days to just 2-3 days. Key changes include new tagging logic and updated decision criteria to maintain profitability checks.

items.title: Seeded 8 High-Quality Wallets from GMGN Rankings in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update populates the smart-money YAML with 8 carefully selected wallets based on GMGN's 30D and 7D rankings. Each wallet meets strict criteria, including a win rate of at least 55% and a trade count of over 380, ensuring only high-quality entries are included. The changes enhance the smart-money signals, providing users with reliable data for informed decision-making.

items.title: Revamped UX for Music Creation in Nexior 🎶
items.summary: This update introduces significant UX enhancements to the Suno music creation page, including a redesigned model dropdown with grouped models and Pro badges, a new tab switcher for Simple/Custom modes, and a style tag cloud for easier genre selection. Additionally, the song action menu has been organized into logical groups, and the lyrics toolbar now features an Undo button and an Enhance lyrics input. These changes aim to improve user experience and accessibility.

items.title: Enhance Connectors with Built-In Badges and Icons in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update refines the connectors page based on live-testing feedback. Key improvements include the addition of a **BUILT-IN** badge for installed connectors, proper icon rendering for built-in cards, and adjustments to card widths to prevent description truncation. These cosmetic changes enhance user experience without altering API functionality.

items.title: Automated i18n Updates in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces auto-generated internationalization (i18n) translation updates from the zh-CN source. Key changes include the addition of multiple language files, enhancing support for various languages such as Arabic, German, Spanish, and more. The English connector.json file has also been modified to improve clarity and consistency.

items.title: Enhance Smart-Money Signals Infrastructure in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new infrastructure for tracking curated smart-money wallet behaviors, allowing for faster cohort analysis by reducing the required sample size. Key additions include a curated wallet list, a refresh script for snapshots, and a service for diffing token holdings. The design emphasizes provenance and fail-soft operations to ensure reliability and accuracy in data collection.

items.title: Introducing a Standalone Connectors Page in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a dedicated `/connectors` page to Nexior, featuring a two-column layout for easy navigation and management of connectors. Users can browse built-in providers, add custom MCP servers, and manage permissions, all while benefiting from internationalization support in English and Chinese. The new UI enhances user experience by providing detailed connector information and streamlined actions.

items.title: Enhance Connector Providers and MCP Catalog in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive catalog of connector providers, including new entries for Notion, Linear, and GitLab, ensuring users can view all available options. Additionally, a built-in MCP server catalog has been added, allowing users to easily access and install public servers. These changes enhance user experience by providing a complete and interactive interface for managing connectors and MCP servers.

items.title: Enhance Slippage Checks for Shadow Trades in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an optional slippage check for shadow trades, ensuring only candidates that can be filled without exceeding a specified price impact are recorded in the ledger. Key changes include new CLI flags for slippage checks and enhancements to the shadow trader workflow for immediate production benefits. The implementation aims to improve the accuracy of trading statistics by filtering out unfillable candidates.

items.title: Automated research cycle update in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new report file under `reports/` as part of the automated research cycle for April 27, 2026. A total of 16 candidates were reviewed, with 3 held and 8 skipped due to high holder concentration or suspicious activity. The Grok service experienced degradation during the analysis, impacting the confidence in some decisions.

items.title: Streamline Pre-Commit with lint-staged in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the existing pre-commit hook to utilize lint-staged, ensuring that only staged files are fixed during commits. It also includes a one-time cleanup of existing lint violations across several components, enhancing the overall code quality. Contributors will now experience fewer distractions from unrelated linting changes in their working tree.

items.title: Restore Sidebar Logo Customization in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update fixes the sidebar logo issue by restoring the dynamic logic for displaying site-specific logos and favicons. The platform favicon is now only used as a fallback, ensuring that custom logos set in the site settings are displayed correctly. Both expanded and collapsed sidebar views have been updated to prioritize the site's logo and favicon as intended.

items.title: fix research cycle slug and eliminate drift in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses recurring auto-research PR failures caused by wall-clock drift in cycle slug generation. The script now requires the slug as an argument, ensuring consistency between the report path and issue body. Additionally, documentation has been updated to reflect these changes, enhancing clarity for future users.

items.title: Simplify chat background for cleaner look in Nexior ✨
items.summary: This update removes the radial-gradient backgrounds from the chat conversation dialogue, responding to user feedback for a simpler design. The changes affect the `.dialogue` selector in the Conversation.vue file, and the dark mode override has also been eliminated as it is no longer necessary. Overall, this enhances the visual clarity of the chat interface.

items.title: Introducing the Go SDK for AceDataCloud in S D K 🚀
items.summary: We've added an official Go SDK that mirrors the existing Python and TypeScript SDKs, enhancing our API's accessibility. Key features include a versatile client with functional options, support for various resources like OpenAI and Images, and robust error handling. This SDK is designed for seamless integration and efficient task management, making it easier for developers to leverage the AceDataCloud API.
